tasks.subject: Task 0: Generalize build_bsa_wheel.py to emit a cp313 wheel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parameterize the one-shot BSA wheel builder to build a cp313-cp313 wheel (torch 2.6.0+cu124) to a new release tag, keeping the cp311 path reproducible.

**Files:** Modify tools/build_bsa_wheel.py; create tests/tools/test_build_bsa_wheel.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** _GH_TAG == bsa-cu124-torch2.6-cp313-v1; provision script installs deadsnakes py3.13 and builds under it (cp313 tag); torch/BSA/arch pins unchanged; --dry-run exits 0 no pod; cp313 filename guard.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/tools/test_build_bsa_wheel.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/build_bsa_wheel.py", "tests/tools/test_build_bsa_wheel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/tools/test_build_bsa_wheel.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_GH_TAG cp313", "py3.13 build", "pins unchanged", "--dry-run exit 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create cp313 release + run live wheel build (RunPod spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce + host block_sparse_attn cp313 wheel on killett/kinoforge-artifacts@bsa-cu124-torch2.6-cp313-v1.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Files:** none (live ops using Task-0 tool).

**Acceptance Criteria:** release tag exists; cp313-cp313 .whl asset present; builder pod destroyed (ledger clean).

**Verify:** curl release-by-tag | rg cp313 .whl name; pixi run kinoforge list → no instances.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl release tag | rg cp313 whl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["release tag exists", "cp313 whl asset", "pod destroyed"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Modal FlashVSR cfg + offline characterization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create examples/configs/modal-flashvsr-x4.yaml (py3.13-slim + cp313 wheel + upscale-only 80GB) + offline tests.

**Files:** create examples/configs/modal-flashvsr-x4.yaml; modify tests/test_modal_config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** resolves ModalProvider, cloud None, min_vram 80; upscale flashvsr, scale 4x, bsa_wheel_url cp313, models [], upscale_only; modal_offers 80GB A100-80GB first.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_config.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/modal-flashvsr-x4.yaml", "tests/test_modal_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ModalProvider cloud None vram80", "flashvsr 4x cp313 upscale_only", "80GB offer first"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire HF_HOME=/cache/hf into Modal container env
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set HF_HOME to the Volume mount so HF-cached weights persist across Modal container starts. Independent of FlashVSR path.

**Files:** modify src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py (create_instance); create tests/providers/modal/test_hf_home_env.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** ModalAppRequest.env HF_HOME == resolved volume_mount (/cache/hf default); operator-supplied HF_HOME not overridden.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_hf_home_env.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_hf_home_env.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_hf_home_env.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HF_HOME default /cache/hf", "operator override preserved"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RED live-proof scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Commit failing (xfail) live-proof contract test BEFORE any Modal spend.

**Files:** create tests/live/test_modal_flashvsr_x4.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** live+xfail, records upscale CLI (config + fixture --video + --no-reuse), asserts 1920x1920 mp4 + frame-QA; committed before Task 5.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_flashvsr_x4.py -v → 1 xfailed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_modal_flashvsr_x4.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_flashvsr_x4.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["live+xfail records upscale CLI + 1920x1920 + frame-QA", "committed before spend"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Live FlashVSR 4x proof — run, frame-QA, teardown, log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run full 480->1920 4x upscale on Modal 80GB, frame-QA, verify teardown, log §24.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Files:** modify successful-generations.md (§24); modify PROGRESS.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** upscale completes, output mp4 1920x1920 (ffprobe); frame-QA ~5 frames no corruption/coherent/faithful to 480 source; kinoforge list + modal app list clean after exit; §24 written.

**Verify:** pixi run kinoforge list (no instances + empty ledger); ffprobe output 1920x1920; §24 present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["output 1920x1920", "frame-QA clean vs source", "teardown clean", "§24 written"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["source", "480", "input"], ["output", "1920", "upscaled"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
